name: Farmer's Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 cup dried skim milk powder (Carnation instant)
1/4 cup lemon juice or white vinegar (I used the latter)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat up the skim milk and mix in the skim milk powder until well combined.
2. As the mixture begins to simmer or boil, gradually add a small amount of the vinegar or lemon juice. Stir constantly.
3. Maintain the heat while continuing to add and stir the mixture until the milk solids separate completely from the whey (yellow watery part). The heat and acidity should be balanced for this process to work effectively.
4. Drain the separated curds in cheesecloth.
5. Use the cooked farmer's cheese as desired, such as flavoring it with salt, pepper, and herbs before stuffing green peppers or using it in other recipes.
Note: Do not let the mixture burn or splutter. Turn off the heat when ready to finish processing.
